title: API Doesn't Return All views
excerpt: I am trying to run a simple query to get the views of a particular board. However, views that calendar and chart are not being returned by the API. Table views are being returned. Is there a reason for this? What am I mi…

posts.author: mordi (Mordi)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to run a simple query to get the views of a particular board. However, views that calendar and chart are not being returned by the API. Table views are being returned. Is there a reason for this? What am I missing?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Posting this in the correct section of the community, the monday Apps & Developers section would probably get you an answer much faster. This is the section of the community for users of the “monday dev” product.

You can find the developer community group by scrolling down on the community home page:
